title: artanthe botrytes
intro: Artanthe botrytes, also known as the cluster fig or Chinese cluster fig, is a species of flowering plant in the family Moraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Artanthe botrytes include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and sore throats. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made by drying and processing the leaves, stems, and fruit to create teas, infusions, and topical ointments for various health purposes.
